Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 109 

FED_SRVC_CTGRY_CD 

LABEL: Federally Assigned Service Category Code Added During TAF Production 

DESCRIPTION: A federally assigned service category code added during TAF production using a standard 
methodology to classify similar types of service use records across all claim files and across both fee-
for-service and managed care encounter records. It also allows for consistent
